scripts.get:flutter: cd gui && fvm flutter pub get
scripts.lint:flutter: cd gui && fvm dart format -l 120 --set-exit-if-changed lib test && fvm flutter analyze
scripts.lint:dart: cd dart_cli && node ../scripts/run-dart.js format -l 120 --set-exit-if-changed bin lib test && node ../scripts/run-dart.js analyze --fatal-infos
scripts.coverage:dart: cd dart_cli && node ../scripts/run-dart.js test --coverage=coverage/ && node ../scripts/run-dart.js run coverage:format_coverage --lcov --in=coverage/ --out=coverage/lcov.info --report-on=lib && node ../scripts/run-dart.js run coverde --update-check disabled report --input coverage/lcov.info --output coverage/html && node ../scripts/package-coverage-html.js && node ../scripts/run-dart.js run coverde --update-check disabled check 80 --input coverage/lcov.info --file-coverage-log-level overview
scripts.coverage:dart:html: cd dart_cli && node ../scripts/run-dart.js run coverde --update-check disabled report --input coverage/lcov.info --output coverage/html
scripts.coverage:dart:text: cd dart_cli && node ../scripts/run-dart.js test --coverage=coverage/ && node ../scripts/run-dart.js run coverage:format_coverage --in=coverage/ --out=coverage/coverage.txt --report-on=lib --pretty-print
scripts.docs:build: docusaurus clear website && docusaurus build website
scripts.run:flutter:linux: cd gui && fvm flutter run -d linux
scripts.run:flutter:macos: cd gui && fvm flutter run -d macos
scripts.run:flutter:windows: cd gui && fvm flutter run -d windows
scripts.build:flutter:linux: cd gui && fvm flutter build linux
scripts.build:flutter:macos: cd gui && fvm flutter build macos
scripts.build:flutter:windows: cd gui && fvm flutter build windows
